anchor: - Matcher too broad (`"*"` when `"Bash"` would do) → narrow it.
new_content: - **Prefix collision:** when the bad command is a prefix of a good one (e.g. `docker compose up` vs `docker compose up -d`), a `startsWith` guard also blocks the safe form. Match exact-equality or use a word-boundary check (`cmd.strip() == 'docker compose up'`), not bare `startsWith`. `permissions.deny` can't express this — use a command-hook with explicit exclusion of the allowed variant.
